test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket with public access block having all four settings enabled (block_public_acls, ignore_public_acls, block_public_policy, restrict_public_buckets all true)
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the public access block configuration
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass because all public access protections are enabled

test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket with public access block missing block_public_acls setting (false)
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the public access block configuration
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because not all four settings are enabled

test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket with public access block missing ignore_public_acls setting (false)
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the public access block configuration
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because not all four settings are enabled

test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket with public access block missing block_public_policy setting (false)
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the public access block configuration
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because not all four settings are enabled

test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket with public access block missing restrict_public_buckets setting (false)
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the public access block configuration
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because not all four settings are enabled

test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket ACL with private canned ACL
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the bucket ACL configuration
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass because private ACL does not allow public access

test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket ACL with public-read canned ACL
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the bucket ACL configuration
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because public-read allows public access

test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket ACL with public-read-write canned ACL
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the bucket ACL configuration
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because public-read-write allows public access

test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket ACL with authenticated-read canned ACL
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the bucket ACL configuration
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because authenticated-read allows public access

test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket ACL with aws-exec-read canned ACL
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the bucket ACL configuration
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because aws-exec-read allows public access

test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket ACL with access control policy grant having WRITE permission
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the bucket ACL configuration
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass because WRITE permission is not in the prohibited list

test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket ACL with access control policy grant having READ permission
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the bucket ACL configuration
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because READ permission allows public read access

test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket ACL with access control policy grant having FULL_CONTROL permission
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the bucket ACL configuration
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because FULL_CONTROL includes read access

test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket ACL with access control policy grant having READ_ACP permission
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the bucket ACL configuration
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because READ_ACP allows reading access control policies

test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket with proper public access block and a bucket policy with no public read actions
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the bucket configuration
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass because no public read access is configured

test_scenarios.given: An S3 bucket with a bucket policy referencing an IAM policy document that allows s3:GetObject action
test_scenarios.when: The policy evaluates the bucket policy and related policy document
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because the policy allows public read access via s3:GetObject
